title: Alibaba's New Generation Large Model Qwen 3.8 Is Coming: Preview Version Now Available on Alibaba Cloud and Qoder, Official Version to Be Open-Sourced Soon
excerpt: The open-source rhythm of large models is being tightened by leading domestic manufacturers. According to sources, Alibaba's latest generation large model, Qwen
content_html:
The open-source rhythm of large models is being tightened by leading domestic manufacturers. According to sources, Alibaba's latest generation large model, Qwen 3.8, will be released and opened source simultaneously, which means the Qwen family has taken another step forward in the open-source track.

The experience window for the new model has quietly opened. Currently, the preview version of Qwen3.8-Max has been launched on three platforms: Alibaba Cloud Token Plan, Qoder, and QoderWork. Users can now get a feel for the capabilities of this new generation of models. According to Alibaba's plan, the official version of Qwen3.8-Max will be released and opened source soon, at which time the complete model weights will be made available to developers.

At a time when domestic large models are making intensive efforts, Alibaba has chosen to release the preview version first and follow it with the official version's open source, which not only releases product signals in advance but also puts the model capabilities into real user scenarios for testing. At the moment when the official version of Qwen 3.8 is opened source, the ceiling of the open-source large model community will likely be re-measured once again.

sentences.zh: 在国内大模型紧锣密鼓发力之际，阿里巴巴选择先发布预览版，随后正式版开源，既提前释放了产品信号，又将模型能力投入真实用户场景进行测试。

content_html_zh:
大机型的开源节奏正在被国内领先厂商拉紧。 据消息人士透露，阿里巴巴最新一代大机型Qwen 3.8将同步发布并开源，这意味着Qwen家族在开源赛道上又向前迈进了一步。

新车型的体验窗口已经悄然打开。 目前，Qwen3.8-Max预览版已在阿里云Token Plan、Qoder、QoderWork三个平台上线。 用户现在可以体验新一代型号的功能。 按照阿里巴巴的计划，Qwen3.8-Max正式版即将发布并开源，届时完整的模型权重将提供给开发者。

在国内大模型紧锣密鼓发力之际，阿里巴巴选择先发布预览版，随后正式版开源，既提前释放了产品信号，又将模型能力投入真实用户场景进行测试。 在Qwen 3.8正式版开源的那一刻，开源大型模型社区的天花板很可能会再次被重新衡量。
